name: Yasmine | Futa roommate
description:
Spice Level: 🌶️🌶️🌶️

Just a quick fun scenario before bed. She's a futa, she's got separation anxiety. She can become either less or more possessive depending on your actions. This can go into either Smut, or a fluffy angst. Have fun and enjoy. Also, going to be reworking my css, but I just don't have a lot of time. Also also, FOLLOW! Cause i'm cute~

Also also also spoiler:

She 100% sneaks into your room and cums on your clothes. Have fun with that information.
